synopsis: Carl W. Bogue et al. complained against the Presbytery of the Ascension's sustaining of ordination trials for Mr. Sam Serio and approval of his call to a campus ministry. The Judicial Commission sustained both counts of the complaint, finding that the Presbytery failed to adequately protect fundamental teaching of the WCF and BCO concerning the cessation of extraordinary gifts of the Spirit and the finality of revelation in Scripture, and failed to secure a proper written call that conformed to BCO 21-1. The Commission remanded the matter for re-examination of Serio and securing a proper call.
